pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 25-35: risk record created with this exact title in Eramba MySQL database
setup_eramba.sh line 144 explicit mapping: '1=Accept, 2=Avoid, 3=Mitigate, 4=Transfer'; verifier.py line 29 expects strategy_id=1 for Accept
setup_eramba.sh line 144 risk_mitigation_strategies mapping confirms strategy 1 is 'Accept'
task.json description line 5 specifies this text must be added to risk description; verifier.py line 83 checks for this exact substring in description field
task.json description line 5 specifies the review date to be set; verifier.py line 92 checks for exact match to this date
setup_task.sh lines 12-20 creates dummy PDF with this exact filename; export_result.sh line 48 queries for attachments with this filename
setup_task.sh lines 11-20 creates PDF at this path using ImageMagick; path matches task description line 4

privileged_info_summary: The task 'formalize_risk_acceptance@1' operates on a synthetic risk record titled 'Legacy ERP - Windows 2008' in an Eramba GRC system (MySQL database in Docker). The risk mitigation strategy IDs are: 1=Accept, 2=Avoid, 3=Mitigate, 4=Transfer. The task requires changing the risk strategy from ID 3 (Mitigate) to ID 1 (Accept), adding the text 'Board Directive 2025-Q1' to the risk description, setting review date to '2025-12-31', and attaching a dummy PDF file ('CEO_Risk_SignOff.pdf') created during setup. The PDF evidence file is generated synthetically at /home/ga/Documents/CEO_Risk_SignOff.pdf using ImageMagick.
